title: lycoctonum sylvaticum
intro: Lycoctonum sylvaticum, also known as Aconitum sylvaticum or Wolf's bane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Aconitum genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory and pain reliever, as well as having antiseptic and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lycoctonum sylvaticum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and should be handled with caution due to its potential toxicity.
